scripts.typecheck: bun run --filter '@0xbigboss/*' typecheck && bun run --filter 'examples-*' typecheck
scripts.knip: bun run --filter '@0xbigboss/rn-playwright-driver' knip && bun run --filter 'examples-*' knip
scripts.cpd: bun run --filter '@0xbigboss/rn-playwright-driver' cpd && bun run --filter 'examples-*' cpd
scripts.check: bun run typecheck && bun run lint && bun run format:check && bun run test
